meaning: n.<拉>(=lberian Peninsula)伊伯利亚半岛,<诗>西班牙
examples: Formula One is keenly followed in India and the sport received a boost when Narain Karthikeyan raced for Jordan in 2005 and Karun Chandhok signed up with Hispania this year.
Hispania do not intend to run the F111 until the final test in Bahrain.
Elsewhere, Hispania Racing (HRT) announced the departure of team principal Colin Kolles after two seasons with the team.
"As a young team we are looking for drivers who can grow with us, " said Hispania boss Colin Kolles.
